descript.abstract: Cuba Social Census Data (Province), 2002 is a polygon theme representing Provinces (1st level administrative units) in Cuba as of 2002. Attribute data include summary results of the 2002 Cuban census questions regarding education and disability characteristics. The documentation of these variables can be found in the "Social" section from the accompanying code book. This dataset is part of Cuba 2002 Census collection.

altsys.altenc: Explicit elevation coordinate included with horizontal coordinates

enttyp.enttypd: File Geodatabase representing census sectors and associated attribute tables.

attr.attrdef: Province Code [cod_prov]
attr.attrdefs: East View Geospatial Inc.

attrdomv.udom: Identifier of the census cestor as a coded value

attr.attrdef: Province Name
attr.attrdefs: East View Geospatial Inc.

attrdomv.udom: Name of Province the census sector falls in

attr.attrdef: Level Of Education Completed: Not In Universe [F0_NIU__not_in_universe_]
attr.attrdefs: National Office Of Statistics and Information (ONEI) Republic of Cuba, 2002 [Oficina Nacional De Estadistica E Información (ONEI) Republica de Cuba, 2002]

attrdomv.udom: Frequency of response in the census sector
